name: @paralegal-ai/summarizer
description: Python FastAPI wrapper for dev orchestration

scripts.dev: bash -c 'cd "$(dirname "$0")" && python -m venv .venv --clear && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd src && python -m uvicorn summarizer.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001'
